item.itunes:title: Full Show - 14 June 2022: We're live from the $50k flat!
item.description:
On today’s podcast with Nickson, Meg & Eli - the $50k flatmate competition is spun on its head when we’re introduced to a new flattie Ruby, a challenge is dished out and a new one is introduced right at the end!
Plus don't miss our chat with Paddy Gower on his booze doco that airs tonight, we chat strange fears (ripped paper & iceblock sticks?!) & weird things that get you horny - a food court for Nickson and Meg getting a head massage!
Enjoy the podcast :)
